models.cases: Each case represents a legal service engagement for a converted customer — Will drafting, Trust creation, or Succession Certificate filing. It is tracked through defined stages from Not Started to Delivered.
models.caseFollowUps: Timeline entries capturing every action and update on a case. Each follow-up includes service-specific actions (e.g., Drafting, Client Review, Court Hearing), notes, priority, and the author.
models.caseNotes: Internal notes on a case visible only to admin, ops, and legal teams. Used for private observations, strategy discussions, and compliance remarks.
models.caseDocuments: Legal documents generated or uploaded for a case — Wills, Trust deeds, Court applications. Each has version tracking, approval status, and download capability.
models.lawyers: Legal professionals who are assigned to handle cases. Each lawyer has a specialization, Bar Council ID, experience, and availability status.
models.customers: Converted clients whose cases are being managed. Referenced by cases for customer details display.

relationships: Each Case belongs to a Customer and is assigned to a Lawyer
Each Case has many FollowUps, Notes, and Documents
Each FollowUp records an action taken on a Case by an Employee or Lawyer
Each Document belongs to a Case and is generated from a legal template

cases.description: Succession certificate application for late father's property in New Delhi. Two properties — residential flat in Connaught Place and agricultural land in Ghaziabad. Court filing scheduled at Tis Hazari Court.
Advanced will covering multiple properties across Chandigarh and Delhi. Includes specific bequests to three children, residuary clause for wife, and special provisions for a charitable trust.
Family trust for Bhatia Corporation assets. Beneficiaries include wife and two children. Settlor clause and Schedule-A property list under revision after client feedback.
Simple will for residential property in Gomti Nagar, Lucknow. Single beneficiary — daughter. Straightforward case, completed within 10 days.

Complex will covering business holdings (Saxena Holdings Pvt. Ltd.), multiple properties across Mumbai and Pune, and international assets in Dubai. Required coordination with overseas counsel for Dubai property clauses.
Irrevocable family trust for Saxena Holdings shares. Trust deed under legal review. Settlor clause revised after meeting with client and CA.
Registration of family trust with Sub-Registrar. Blocked — waiting for trust deed approval in Case W24-CASE-00006.

Advanced will with medical directives, healthcare proxy, organ donation clauses, and charitable bequests. Multiple properties across Chennai and Coimbatore. Special attention needed for medical practice succession.
Basic will for textile factory and family home in Amritsar. Single beneficiary — son. Will registered at Sub-Registrar.

caseFollowUps.title: Court filing date confirmed
caseFollowUps.notes: Succession certificate petition filed at Tis Hazari Court. Petition number TH/SC/2026/4421. Next hearing scheduled for 28 Apr 2026. All documents submitted.
caseFollowUps.author: Adv. Sanjay Mishra

caseFollowUps.title: Application draft finalized
caseFollowUps.notes: Succession certificate application form completed. Verified all claimant details with client. Application ready for court submission.
caseFollowUps.author: Adv. Sanjay Mishra

caseFollowUps.title: Document collection completed
caseFollowUps.notes: Received death certificate, legal heir certificate, and property documents from client. All documents verified and attested.
caseFollowUps.author: Anurag Bhatia

caseFollowUps.title: Initial consultation with client
caseFollowUps.notes: Discussed succession certificate requirements. Client provided death certificate and property documents. Explained court process timeline — approximately 8-12 weeks.
caseFollowUps.author: Anurag Bhatia

caseFollowUps.title: Will delivered to client
caseFollowUps.notes: Final signed will delivered via registered post. Client acknowledged receipt. Tracking number: ED123456789IN. Original retained in office safe (Locker #A-12).
caseFollowUps.author: Adv. Priya Sharma

caseFollowUps.title: Client approved final draft
caseFollowUps.notes: Vikram reviewed the final draft with family. All clauses approved. Witnesses identified — Harpreet Singh and Amrita Bhatia. Will execution scheduled for 7 Apr.
caseFollowUps.author: Adv. Priya Sharma

caseFollowUps.title: Revision — charitable trust clause added
caseFollowUps.notes: As per client request, added Clause 12(b) establishing a charitable trust for education fund. 5% of residuary estate allocated to Bhatia Education Foundation.
caseFollowUps.author: Adv. Priya Sharma

caseFollowUps.title: First draft shared with client
caseFollowUps.notes: Will draft v1 sent to client for review. Covers Chandigarh property, Delhi apartment, and Bhatia Corporation shares. Client requested changes to residuary clause.
caseFollowUps.author: Adv. Priya Sharma

caseFollowUps.title: Trust deed draft shared for review
caseFollowUps.notes: First draft of family trust deed sent to client for review. Awaiting feedback on beneficiary distribution ratios. Settlement amount proposed at ₹1,00,000.
caseFollowUps.author: Adv. Priya Sharma

caseFollowUps.title: Trust deed review meeting
caseFollowUps.notes: Met with Arvind Saxena and his CA at Mumbai office. Discussed trust structure for Saxena Holdings shares. Minor changes needed on settlor clause and Schedule-A property list. CA will provide updated valuation by 18 Apr.
caseFollowUps.author: Adv. Sanjay Mishra

caseFollowUps.title: Trust deed draft completed
caseFollowUps.notes: Initial trust deed draft completed for irrevocable family trust. Settlor: Arvind Saxena. Trustees: Arvind Saxena & Meera Saxena. Beneficiaries: Three children.
caseFollowUps.author: Adv. Sanjay Mishra

caseFollowUps.title: Medical directive clauses added
caseFollowUps.notes: Added healthcare proxy and organ donation clauses as per Dr. Lakshmi's request. Also added DNR directive and medical practice succession clause (to Dr. Ramesh Venkataraman). Draft v1 shared for review.
caseFollowUps.author: Adv. Kavita Reddy

caseFollowUps.title: Initial consultation — special requirements
caseFollowUps.notes: Dr. Lakshmi wants specific medical directives included in will. Discussed healthcare proxy, organ donation preferences, and charitable bequests to Apollo Foundation. Will requires coordination with hospital legal team.
caseFollowUps.author: Anurag Bhatia

caseFollowUps.title: Will registered at Sub-Registrar
caseFollowUps.notes: Advanced will registered at Sub-Registrar, Nariman Point, Mumbai. Registration number: MH/2026/SR/2891. Original handed over to client. Certified copy retained.
caseFollowUps.author: Manish Tiwari

caseFollowUps.title: Case placed on hold
caseFollowUps.notes: Trust registration blocked — waiting for trust deed approval in Case W24-CASE-00006. Will resume once trust deed is finalized and approved.
caseFollowUps.author: Adv. Sanjay Mishra

caseNotes.content: Client's brother (Suresh Jain) has contested the succession claim informally via phone. Not yet filed formal objection. Advise lawyer to prepare for potential counter-petition.
caseNotes.author: Anurag Bhatia

caseNotes.content: Dubai property clause reviewed by overseas counsel (Al Habtoor Legal). Confirmed UAE succession law applicability. Client advised to execute a separate will in Dubai for the apartment — facilitated introduction to Dubai firm.
caseNotes.author: Adv. Priya Sharma

caseNotes.content: Arvind's CA (Rajiv Gupta, +91 98765 00001) will provide updated share valuation by 18 Apr. Hold trust deed finalization until valuation is received. Board resolution from Saxena Holdings also pending.
caseNotes.author: Adv. Sanjay Mishra

caseNotes.content: Dr. Lakshmi's medical practice involves a partnership deed with Apollo Medical Group. Need to verify if practice succession clause conflicts with partnership terms. Coordination with Apollo's legal team required.
caseNotes.author: Adv. Kavita Reddy

caseNotes.content: Vikram mentioned interest in adding a codicil later for a new property purchase expected in Q3 2026. Flag for follow-up in July.
caseNotes.author: Anurag Bhatia

caseDocuments.title: Last Will & Testament — Dr. Lakshmi Venkataraman
